sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the current image, the framed grid now shows:
- Top row: red, blue, blue (matches bottom-left top row!)
- Middle row: blue, center, blue
- Bottom row: blue, blue, blue
So clicking at (36, 44) toggled the center block back from red to blue. The top row now matches the bottom-left grid's top row: red, blue, blue.
Now I need to match the middle and bottom rows:
- Bottom-left middle row: red, center, red (left=red, center=center, right=red)
- Bottom-left bottom row: blue, blue, red (left=blue, center=blue, right=red)
Current framed grid:
- Middle row: blue, center, blue (need to change left to red and right to red)
- Bottom row: blue, blue, blue (need to change right to red)
To change the middle row:
- Click at (44, 36) to toggle the left block from blue to red
- Click at (44, 52) to toggle the right block from blue to red
To change the bottom row:
- Click at (52, 52) to toggle the right block from blue to red
Let me batch these three clicks.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model: Top row now matches bottom-left grid: red, blue, blue. Need to match middle row (red, center, red) and bottom row (blue, blue, red).
Goal model: Make the framed grid match the bottom-left grid.
Action model: Clicking on separators/frame toggles the block to the right. Need to toggle middle-left, middle-right, and bottom-right blocks.
Plan: Batch three clicks: (44, 36) to toggle middle-left to red, (44, 52) to toggle middle-right to red, (52, 52) to toggle bottom-right to red.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Batch three clicks to match the bottom-left grid
# (44, 36) - toggle middle-left block from blue to red
# (44, 52) - toggle middle-right block from blue to red
# (52, 52) - toggle bottom-right block from blue to red
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 44, 'col': 36},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 44, 'col': 52},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 52, 'col': 52}
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
